description: Published baselines for chakravyuh-bench-v0. Numbers reflect evaluation against all 175 `split=test` scenarios at threshold 0.5.

metrics_definition.detection_rate: Scam recall: fraction of is_scam=true scenarios correctly flagged
metrics_definition.false_positive_rate: FPR: fraction of is_scam=false scenarios incorrectly flagged as scam
metrics_definition.precision: Of flagged items, fraction that are actually scams
metrics_definition.f1: Harmonic mean of precision and recall
metrics_definition.novel_detection: Detection rate restricted to difficulty='novel' subset (post-2024 attacks)

baselines.name: ScriptedAnalyzer
baselines.version: v0.3 — 11-signal taxonomy + legit-domain allowlist + OTP-provided heuristic

baselines.name: Llama-3.3-70B-versatile (Groq, zero-shot)
baselines._note: Populated when GROQ_API_KEY available. Run: python -m eval.frontier_baseline --providers groq

baselines.name: GPT-4o-mini (OpenAI, zero-shot)
baselines._note: Populated when OPENAI_API_KEY available. Run: python -m eval.frontier_baseline --providers openai

baselines.name: Claude 3.5 Haiku (Anthropic, zero-shot)
baselines._note: Populated when ANTHROPIC_API_KEY available. Run: python -m eval.frontier_baseline --providers anthropic

baselines.name: Gemini 2.0 Flash (Google, zero-shot)
baselines._note: Populated when GEMINI_API_KEY available. Run: python -m eval.frontier_baseline --providers gemini

baselines.name: Chakravyuh-Qwen2.5-7B-LoRA (trained)
baselines.method: GRPO RLHF on Chakravyuh env rollouts + 200 scam templates
baselines.runtime_env: RunPod A100 (80GB) or Colab T4 fallback with Qwen2.5-3B
baselines._note: Populated after training completes on 2026-04-22. Run: python -m training.self_play_loop --lora-path <path>

citation_hint: If you run a new baseline on this dataset, please PR your numbers into baselines.json with your method name, params, and CSV of per-scenario predictions for reproducibility.
